message:
shared: Deduplicate user and assistant messages in transcript conversion

Claude Code sometimes logs the same message multiple times (once with
images, once without for user messages, or duplicate thinking/agent
blocks). This adds deduplication during conversion:

- User messages: dedupe by (timestamp, text), keep the one with images
- Thinking/agent: dedupe by (id, timestamp, text)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/jzs3motrrd
